name: Walt Whitman
abstract: Walter Whitman Jr. (; May 31, 1819 – March 26, 1892) was an American poet, essayist, and journalist; he also wrote two novels.

works_created.t: Song of the Open Road: Excerpt

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: That was Walt Whitman. The words were Walt Whitman. The music was Charles Ives.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Cobb — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
